mapper.sql: id, user_id, student_no, application_no, chinese_name, english_name, gender, birth_date, nationality, native_language, email, phone, wechat, passport_no, passport_country, passport_issue_date, passport_expire_date, college, major, degree_level, grade, class_name, enrollment_date, expected_graduation_date, student_status, avatar_url, remark, status, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_profile ( user_id, student_no, application_no, chinese_name, english_name, gender, birth_date, nationality, native_language, email, phone, wechat, passport_no, passport_country, passport_issue_date, passport_expire_date, college, major, degree_level, grade, class_name, enrollment_date, expected_graduation_date, student_status, avatar_url, remark, status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{studentNo}, #{applicationNo}, #{chineseName}, #{englishName}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{nationality}, #{nativeLanguage}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{wechat}, #{passportNo}, #{passportCountry}, #{passportIssueDate}, #{passportExpireDate}, #{college}, #{major}, #{degreeLevel}, #{grade}, #{className}, #{enrollmentDate}, #{expectedGraduationDate}, #{studentStatus}, #{avatarUrl}, #{remark}, #{status} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE student_profile
user_id = #{userId}, student_no = #{studentNo}, application_no = #{applicationNo}, chinese_name = #{chineseName}, english_name = #{englishName}, gender = #{gender}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, nationality = #{nationality}, native_language = #{nativeLanguage}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, wechat = #{wechat}, passport_no = #{passportNo}, passport_country = #{passportCountry}, passport_issue_date = #{passportIssueDate}, passport_expire_date = #{passportExpireDate}, college = #{college}, major = #{major}, degree_level = #{degreeLevel}, grade = #{grade}, class_name = #{className}, enrollment_date = #{enrollmentDate}, expected_graduation_date = #{expectedGraduationDate}, student_status = #{studentStatus}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, remark = #{remark}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE student_profile SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM student_profile WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM student_profile
ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT FROM student_profile WHERE student_no = #{studentNo} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM student_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE student_profile SET student_status = #{studentStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
